tools.name: Sheets
tools.tagline: Spreadsheets — a free grid of cells you edit inline.

tools.name: Docs
tools.tagline: Rich-text documents in a nesting page tree.

tools.name: Notes
tools.tagline: Quick free-form notes; pin the ones that matter.

pages.title: Welcome
pages.body: This is a rich-text document. Open it to edit; use the + on a page to add a child page (a sub-tab).

pages.title: How sheets work
pages.body: The Sheets tab is a workbook. The switcher at the top flips between sheets; edit a cell by tapping it, and add rows or new columns straight from the grid.

notes.title: Suite is one applet
notes.body: Sheets, Docs and Notes all live in this single suite — one store, one launcher tile.

notes.title: Try it
notes.body: Tap a tool on Home, or use the bottom tabs to jump straight in.
